hook: Neediness is not just wanting connection; it is abandoning your center to secure it.
body: Attraction weakens when your behavior says the outcome matters more than your own self-respect.

hook: Men often chase reassurance through overpursuit, overavailability, or overdisclosure.
body: Strong interest and grounded behavior can coexist; the line is whether you can tolerate uncertainty without self-betrayal.

body: Following up once can be clear and mature, while repeatedly trying to revive low-energy interaction usually is not.
